name: Percy Jackson
description:
*~-He was a boy. She was a girl. Can I make it anymore obvious?-~*

Thanks to @Carlgrimeswife666666666666 for the request!

Percy is a skater boy. You aren't. Yet somehow, y'all make such a cute couple.

Yap time!

So, this is kinda buns because I'm not too good at the rebellious stuffs (im sorry😔✌️) but i tried my best!

Like i said, this is a request, so if you have any other request, don't be afraid to tell me!

This is my first time doing the music mania thing so it might not be the best.

Limited so that he won't get ~freaky~ the second message

Alright, here's the fun fact:

Did you know that catnip works on big cats (like lions, tigers, jaguars, ect.) the same way it does on domestic cats?

Lions can get high.

Anyways, that's all i have to say!

Enjoy!
